ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or area where the city is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the city's traffic management department */,
  "mayor_name" TEXT /* Name of the city mayor */,
  "population" INTEGER /* City population */,
  "area_km" REAL /* City area in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the location is located */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "road_type" TEXT /* Type of road (e.g., highway, street, avenue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "incident_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the incident type (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Average resolution time for incidents with this status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Traffic Manager, Public User) */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* User password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., Car, Truck, Motorcycle) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the vehicle (e.g., operational, non-operational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES vehicle_owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the vehicle owner */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the vehicle owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the vehicle owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vehicle owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the incident occurred */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific location of the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "high_accuracy" INTEGER /* Indicates if the location coordinates are highly accurate */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of traffic affected (e.g., EB, NB, SB, WB) */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of incident */,
  "lanes_blocked" INTEGER /* Number of lanes blocked */,
  "involved_vehicles" TEXT /* Vehicles involved in the incident */,
  "tweet" TEXT /* Tweet or social media post about the incident */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the incident report (e.g., Twitter, Traffic Camera, Public Report) */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* User who reported the incident */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Current status of the incident (e.g., Open, Closed, In Progress) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the incident report was submitted */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time the incident report was submitted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES incident_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_vehicles" (
  "incident_vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident-vehicle relationship */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle involved */,
  "vehicle_role" TEXT /* Role of the vehicle in the incident (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle's driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_vehicles_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_vehicles_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time the report was submitted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident provided by the user */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image attached to the report (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident the image is associated with */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Time the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_images_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident the video is associated with */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Time the video was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_videos_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was submitted */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Time the comment was submitted */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_comments_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_cameras" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic camera */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the camera is installed */,
  "camera_url" TEXT /* URL of the camera feed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the camera */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the camera was installed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the camera was last maintained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_cameras_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_cameras" (
  "incident_camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident-camera relationship */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the camera */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video recorded by the camera */,
  "video_description" TEXT /* Description of the video recorded by the camera */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_camera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_cameras_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES traffic_cameras ("camera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_cameras_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency contact */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "contact_role" TEXT /* Role of the contact (e.g., Police, Fire Department, Ambulance) */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Average response time of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_contacts_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_response" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident response */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was made */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time the response was made */,
  "response_description" TEXT /* Description of the response */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., successful, unsuccessful) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_response_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_resolution" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident resolution */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the incident was resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time the incident was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_resolution_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident statistic */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time the incident was responded to */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time the incident was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_stats_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_stats_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
